name: rotom
flavor_texts: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.
Its electric-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief.
Research continues on this Pokémon, which could be the power source of a unique motor.
One boy’s invention led to the development of many different machines that take advantage of Rotom’s unique capabilities.
With a body made of plasma, it can inhabit all sorts of machines. It loves to surprise others.
This bizarre Pokémon appears to be a will-o'-the-wisp powered by electricity. Be wary, as Rotom is both smart and mischievous.
text: Rotom is the Plasma Pokémon. It is a electric and ghost-type Pokémon. Abilities: levitate. Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 50, Defense: 77, Sp. Atk: 95, Sp. Def: 77, Speed: 91. Evolution line: rotom. Lore: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc. Its electric-like body can enter some kinds of machines and take control in order to make mischief. Research continues on this Pokémon, which could be the power source of a unique motor. One boy’s invention led to the development of many different machines that take advantage of Rotom’s unique capabilities. With a body made of plasma, it can inhabit all sorts of machines. It loves to surprise others.
